title: Half a Heart(HH)
description:
This is a mod that makes Half a Heart Challenges easy.Ingame you have to type /half_a_heart in chat or press the insert key to activate it.

Have Fun using this mod!
body: This is a mod that makes Half a Heart Challenges easy.Ingame you have to type /half_a_heart in chat or press the insert key to activate it. Have Fun using this mod!
